Here is a comparison of the two libraries:

| Library    | Version | Stars | Notes                          |
| ---------- | ------- | ----- | ------------------------------ |
| fastlib    | 1.2.0   | 4.5k  | tiny API, very fast            |
| heavyframe | 0.9.1   | 12.0k | full-featured, larger surface  |
| middleone  | 2.0.0   | 8.2k  | balanced — good defaults       |

Choose based on your project's needs.
